violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the toilet room is lacking signage. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2025

Raw animal foods (eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (milk) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2025

The door to the outside, located in the front entrance and back door, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings in dry storage area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2025
Drinks were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler and back storage area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of rodent droppings. 1. Receiving area (ledges) 2. Dry storage shelving New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2025
The wall in the receiving area is in poor repair, observed multiple holes. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024
The wall in the dry storage area is not covered with a smooth, durable, and easily cleanable (insulation is exposed). Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024
Hand-washing sink in the restroom is lacking signage. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024

Raw animal foods (eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (milk) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2024

The door to the outside, located in the retail entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024
Drinks were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler and back storage area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the receiving area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024

Observed exposed installation in dry storage area. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024
The wall in the receiving area is in poor repair, observed whole. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024
